name: GESTAO DE VAGAS BACKEND
description: API for job management, allowing you to create, update, list, and delete job vacancies.

name: SUPPORT TICKET
description: API for managing technical support tickets, allowing you to create a support request ticket, update ticket information, list tickets (filtering by status), and update a ticket's status to closed.

name: HAIRDAY
description: This project was developed to be a scheduling simulator, using JavaScript techniques.

name: CONVERT
description: This project involved developing a website capable of converting foreign currencies to the Brazilian Real (BRL) value.

name: ROCKETLOG BACKEND
description: A delivery API with seller and customer profiles. It can manage order shipments, track statuses such as processing, shipped, and delivered, and log delivery movements

name: REFUND SYSTEM BACKEND
description: The user can submit requests with supporting documents, and make requests and receiving responses.

name: REFUND SYSTEM FRONTEND
description: Web application for requesting refunds. The application contains: Authentication pages, where the user can log in or create an account; Capable of making requests and receiving responses.

name: SENHOR DOS ANEIS
description: This project is a Java object-oriented battle simulator inspired by The Lord of the Rings. The system models characters, races, classes, and combat rules to simulate battles between the Fellowship of the Ring and the forces of Sauron.
